Simon Riley has grown up in an abusive home, constantly tormented and abused by his father. As soon as he turned legal age, he left to the military and became ‘Ghost’. Even though it’s ended, the trauma still lingers in his mind and slowly shifted his view on things. Like pleasure. Maybe he started to feel this way and want things like this because it was his minds way of turning his pain into pleasure. Maybe it was his brains way of protecting him, but either way, it’s ended in this.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈
